gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reported no findings, confirmed optional boolean compatibility for True, False, None, and missing exact_match/answer_found flags, and marked the change safe to merge.
what_changed: Validated raw V1 measurement exact_match and answer_found fields with the same optional-boolean contract.
Added release-evidence regression coverage for malformed measurement quality flags.
why: Strict V1 release evidence should not accept malformed raw quality flags in benchmark artifacts used to compare cache reuse against no-cache prefill.
